title: Manufacturing Production Engineer (Silver Paste, up to $3300) - TK
description:
• AWS + Variable Bonus

  • Permanent role

  • Working location: Kent Ridge

Manufacturing Production Engineer (Silver Paste)

You will be part of a Manufacturing Production Engineer (Silver Paste) to manage the specialized silver paste production line. Key responsibilities include machine optimization, quality data analysis, and coordinating international production transitions. A Diploma in Engineering and strong problem-solving skills are essential for this global-facing role.

  • Operate and maintain specialized machinery for silver paste manufacturing

  • Monitor equipment performance and perform changeovers to meet production needs

  • Conduct quality inspections, collect and analyze quality data, and prepare reports

  • Ensure availability of materials and compliance with operating procedures

  • Improve manufacturing efficiency through workflow, layout, and process analysis

  • Support research and development activities and new product introductions

  • Implement corrective and preventive actions to enhance quality systems

  • Maintain documentation and ensure compliance with ISO 9001 and ISO 45001 standards

  • Coordinate equipment maintenance and regulatory compliance requirements

  • Provide manufacturing and quality support to global customers and production teams

  • Perform additional duties as assigned

Job Requirements

  • Diploma in Engineering holder preferred

  • Self-motivated and energetic, able to work in a fast-paced environment.

  • Strong communication and relationship-building skills, with a team-oriented yet independent working style.

  • Proficient in data collection and analysis, with solid problem-solving abilities and a customer-focused mindset.

Interested applicants, please send your resume to Tiffany Koh (R1104633) with email subject header "Job Application for Manufacturing Production Engineer (Silver Paste) - TK " .

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Other applications will be updated to our database for future job opportunities.

By submitting any resumes or applications to Pasona Singapore Pte Ltd, you are considered to have read and agreed on the terms of our Privacy Policy, and consented to us collecting, using, retaining, disclosing your personal information to the prospective employers for their consideration.

Please find our Privacy Policy Agreement from the below link.

http://www.pasona.com.sg/privacy.html

Thank you for your kind understanding and co-operation.

Pasona Singapore Pte Ltd

― Who Are We? ―
Pasona Singapore Pte. Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pasona Inc. (Japan), was established in 1984, a leading Japan-based recruitment firm in Singapore with experience over 35 years. We have a strong network of 15 countries and 59 other overseas branches across the world (as of July, 2020) and provide not only placement services but also deliver various types of HR-related services in high quality.


― For Job Seekers ―
